case_title: SALLIE KING et al VS. CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY KING, SALLIE KING, IDALIA AS TO DEFENDANT CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KING, SALLIE KING, IDALIA MORRIS, MONIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,085.00, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF THE DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT, NOT LATER THAN MARCH 30, 2011, PROVIDE PLAINTIFF WITH A NEW STOVE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-09-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-02-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-02-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KING, SALLIE KING, IDALIA AS TO DEFENDANT CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-02-2011 - JUDGMENT.
